sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id INTEGER, array1 FLOAT[], array2 FLOAT[]);
INSERT INTO test_arrays VALUES (1, array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT), array_value(2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT, 4.0::FLOAT));
INSERT INTO test_arrays VALUES (2, array_value(4.0::FLOAT, 5.0::FLOAT, 6.0::FLOAT), array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 0.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT));
SELECT id, array_inner_product(array1, array2) AS inner_product FROM test_arrays;
UPDATE test_arrays SET array2 = array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT) WHERE id = 1;
